name: @metorial/chameleon
description: Manage in-app product adoption experiences for SaaS applications. Create and manage product tours, microsurveys, tooltips, launchers (checklists), embeddables, and HelpBar content. Send and update user profiles and company data, track tour interactions and microsurvey responses, manage audience segments for targeting experiences, and configure webhooks for real-time data exchange. Import user data in bulk, manage approved domains and environments, and access delivery and interaction analytics for tours and surveys.
